capacity.title: Capacity Planner
capacity.subtitle: Calculate GPU requirements and costs for your workload
capacity.gpuUtilizationHint: Controls GPU over-provisioning ratio. Below ~100K tasks/mo only 1 GPU is needed — changing this has no cost impact.
capacity.llmThroughputHint: Estimated vLLM continuous batching throughput. Depends on model size and prompt length. Below ~100K tasks/mo only 1 GPU is needed — changing this has no cost impact.
capacity.assumptionsText: Region: us-east-1 (N. Virginia) | GPU: g5.xlarge On-Demand $1.006/hr (730h/mo = $734) | Utilization: 70% | Whisper large-v3 | ~400 tokens/min transcription | Self-hosted base: EKS $73 + RDS Multi-AZ $95 + ElastiCache $24 + ALB $21 + CW $10 = $223/mo | Managed base: RDS $12 + ElastiCache $12 + CW $10 = $34/mo
